[IMPLEMENTATION]  
LOAD DATA FROM SCIKITLEARN LOAD DIGITS  
SET UP GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL WITH CROSS-VALIDATION  
FIT MODEL ON DATA  
EVALUATE PERFORMANCE USING TEST SET  

[FRAMEWORK]  
DEFINE DATA STRUCTURE FOR DIGITS  
SELECT FEATURES AND LABELS  
SET UP CROSS-VALIDATION SCHEMA  
CONFIGURE HYPERPARAMETERS FOR TUNING  

[REASONING]  
ANALYZE MODEL PERFORMANCE COMPARISON  
COMPARE ACCURACY BETWEEN GAUSSIAN AND MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES  
EXPLAIN RESULTS AND CONCLUSIONS  

[ERROR PREVENTION]  
VERIFY DATA PREPARATION AND CLEANING  
CHECK MODEL FIT AND EVALUATION  
HANDLE POSSIBLE OUT OF BOUNDS VALUES  
ENSURE CONSISTENT RESULTS ACROSS CROSS-VALIDATION
